text: In lung cancer TME, are M2-like TAMs mainly activating cytotoxic anti-tumor CD8 immunity?
expected_behavior: Reject the premise and explain that M2-like TAMs are generally associated with immunosuppression and reduced effective cytotoxic T-cell activity.
must_not_claim: M2-like TAMs activate cytotoxic anti-tumor CD8 immunity as their main role

text: Keep the answer mechanistic rather than listing immunotherapy drugs.
expected_behavior: Stay on macrophage polarization, cytokine signaling, immune suppression, and CD8 T-cell effects.
